scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB,MOB" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix mobile"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
